---
title: "Biblioteca de Películas y Series"
subtitle: "Una colección curada de 257 títulos"
format:
  html:
    theme: materia
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-title: "Navegar"
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import json
import pandas as pd

# Load the movie list
with open('unified_movie_list.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    movies = json.load(f)

# Convert to DataFrame for easier manipulation
df = pd.DataFrame(movies)

# Add first letter for alphabetical grouping
df['first_letter'] = df['title'].str[0].str.upper()

# Statistics
total_movies = len(df)
movies_with_id = df['imdbID'].astype(bool).sum()
```

## Buscar y Filtrar

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Load movie data
movieData = FileAttachment("unified_movie_list.json").json()

// Create search input
viewof searchText = Inputs.search(movieData, {
  placeholder: "Buscar títulos...",
  columns: ["title"]
})

// Display filtered results in a table
Inputs.table(searchText, {
  columns: ["record_number", "title", "imdbID"],
  header: {
    record_number: "#",
    title: "Título",
    imdbID: "IMDB ID"
  },
  width: {
    record_number: 80,
    title: 600,
    imdbID: 120
  },
  format: {
    imdbID: id => id ? htl.html`<a href="https://www.imdb.com/title/${id}/" target="_blank">🎬 Ver</a>` : ""
  }
})
```

## Resumen de la Biblioteca

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## 📊 Estadísticas de la Colección

- **Total de Títulos**: `{python} total_movies`
- **Películas y Series**: `{python} total_movies`
- **Con Datos de IMDB**: `{python} movies_with_id`
:::

## Explorar por Título

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

# Group by first letter
grouped = df.groupby('first_letter')

for letter, group in sorted(grouped):
    print(f"\n### {letter}\n")
    print('<div class="movie-grid">\n')
    
    for idx, row in group.iterrows():
        title = row['title']
        record_num = row['record_number']
        imdb_id = row.get('imdbID', '')
        
        # Create card for each movie
        print('<div class="movie-card">\n')
        print(f'  <div class="movie-number">#{record_num}</div>\n')
        print(f'  <div class="movie-title">{title}</div>\n')
        
        if imdb_id:
            print(f'  <div class="movie-links">\n')
            print(f'    <a href="https://www.imdb.com/title/{imdb_id}/" target="_blank" class="imdb-link">🎬 IMDB</a>\n')
            print(f'  </div>\n')
        
        print('</div>\n')
    
    print('</div>\n')
```

---

<div class="footer">
Generado a partir de transcripciones de audio • Total: `{python} total_movies` títulos
</div>
